# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-egress
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
    - mesh-gateway
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: api.thirdparty.com

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-egress
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  gateways:
    - mesh-gateway
  tcp:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: db.externaldb.com
